subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-11
subcodes.first_line: My mind was preoccupied last night with the materialist philosophers, and how oblivious they are
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب در خیال فلاسفه بودم که این نفوس چه قدر غافلند با وجود آنکه خطایای فلاسفهٴ سابقین
subcodes.subjects: @ether; the phenomenon of light, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @limits of the intellect
